title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 528.520 - Payment of money adjudged, when
text:
528.520.  Payment of money adjudged, when. — When an answer is filed and the facts determined, the court shall proceed to adjudge and order the payment of the money to the party entitled.
(RSMo 1939 § 1760) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1596; 1919 § 2044; 1909 § 2608
